<p class="key-answer" data-question="Tocofersolan 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Tocofersolan</strong> 目前有 <strong>23 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Tocofersolan 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Vedrop is indicated in vitamin-E deficiency due to digestive malabsorption in paediatric patients suffering from congenital chronic cholestasis or hereditary chronic cholestasis, from birth (in term...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>amenorrhea (disease)（99.3%）</li>
<li>acne (disease)（99.0%）</li>
<li>malignant catarrh（98.2%）</li>
<li>infectious bovine rhinotracheitis（98.2%）</li>
<li>conjunctivitis（97.4%）</li>
<li>cytomegalovirus infection（97.2%）</li>
<li>antithrombin deficiency type 2（97.0%）</li>
<li>factor 5 excess with spontaneous thrombosis（96.9%）</li>
<li>roseolovirus infectious disease（96.8%）</li>
<li>peripheral arterial disease（96.7%）</li>
<li>peripheral vascular disease（96.5%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（96.5%）</li>
<li>heparin cofactor 2 deficiency（96.4%）</li>
<li>blepharoconjunctivitis（96.4%）</li>
<li>resistance to thyroid hormone due to a mutation in thyroid hormone receptor beta（96.4%）</li>
<li>intermittent vascular claudication（96.3%）</li>
<li>intracranial arteriosclerosis（96.3%）</li>
<li>tinea corporis（96.3%）</li>
<li>parasitic eyelid infestation（96.3%）</li>
<li>dermatitis（96.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
